pages.title: Get started with the API
pages.description: Learn when to call the General Translation API directly, how authentication works, and how to use the OpenAPI spec.

pages.title: Upload source files
pages.description: Upload one or more source files to a project before queuing translation.

pages.title: Upload translations
pages.description: Upload translated files that match previously uploaded source files.

pages.title: Submit file diffs
pages.description: Submit diffs for changed source or translated content instead of uploading full files.

pages.title: Download files
pages.description: Download multiple translated files in one request.

pages.title: Download file
pages.description: Download a single translated file for a project, locale, or version.

pages.title: Publish files
pages.description: Mark translated files as published so they are ready for delivery.

pages.title: Get file information
pages.description: Inspect source file metadata, versions, locales, and translation state.

pages.title: Get translation status
pages.description: Check translation progress and availability by file and locale.

pages.title: Move files
pages.description: Move or rename files in a project.

pages.title: Get orphaned files
pages.description: Find translated files that are no longer connected to current source files.

pages.title: Generate translation context
pages.description: Generate project glossary terms and translation instructions from source files.

pages.title: Check context freshness
pages.description: Check whether project context is missing, stale, or ready to refresh.

pages.title: Get context generation status
pages.description: Track the status of a context generation job.

pages.title: Translate content at runtime
pages.description: Translate strings or structured content directly from an application or service.

pages.title: Queue translations
pages.description: Queue uploaded source files for background translation.

pages.title: Get translation job status
pages.description: Retrieve status for a queued translation job.

pages.title: Get branch information
pages.description: Inspect branch metadata and project branch state.

pages.title: Create a branch
pages.description: Create a branch, or rename and confirm the default branch.

pages.title: Create or update tag
pages.description: Create or update a tag on file versions for release tracking.

pages.title: Get project information
pages.description: Read project metadata, settings, and configuration details.

pages.title: Update project information
pages.description: Update project-level settings from automation.
